    (t-oplus (t-oplus 39 64) (t-otimes 15 (t-oplus 13 31)))
    (t-oplus (t-oplus 69 18) (t-otimes 50 (t-oplus 59 48)))))

; (((86 ⊕ 96) ⊕ (90 ⊗ (70 ⊕ 54))) ⊗ ((76 ⊕ 96) ⊕ (94 ⊗ (20 ⊕ 54))))

  (t-otimes
    (t-oplus (t-oplus 86 96) (t-otimes 90 (t-oplus 70 54)))
    (t-oplus (t-oplus 76 96) (t-otimes 94 (t-oplus 20 54)))))

; Left outer: A ⊕ B
(define LEFT (t-oplus A B))

  (t-otimes

    (t-oplus (t-oplus 88 48) (t-otimes 70 (t-oplus 83 46)))))

; Right outer: C ⊕ D
(define RIGHT (t-oplus C D))

; Final: LEFT ⊗ RIGHT
(define RESULT (t-otimes LEFT RIGHT))

(display "A = ") (display A) (newline)

(define (set-union a b)

        (loop (cdr rest) (add-if-missing (car rest) acc)))))

(define (set-intersect a b)
  (let loop ((rest a) (acc '()))
    (if (null? rest) acc
        (loop (cdr rest)
              (if (member (car rest) b)
                  (cons (car rest) acc)
                  acc)))))

;; Manual sort by known alphabet order
(define alpha '(a b c d e f g h i j k l))
(define (sort-set s)
  (let loop ((letters alpha) (acc '()))
    (if (null? letters) (reverse acc)
        (loop (cdr letters)
              (if (member (car letters) s)
                  (cons (car letters) acc)
                  acc)))))

;; Define set operations
(define (set-union a b)
  (let loop ((b b) (acc a))
    (if (null? b)
        acc
        (loop (cdr b)
              (if (member (car b) acc) acc (cons (car b) acc))))))

(define (set-intersect a b)
  (filter (lambda (x) (member x b)) a))

(define (sort-set s)
  (sort s (lambda (x y) (string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string y)))))

  (cond ((null? A) B)
        ((member (car A) B) (my-union (cdr A) B))

        (else (set-intersect (cdr a) b))))

; Manual sort using insertion sort
(define (insert-sorted x lst)
  (cond ((null? lst) (list x))
        ((string<? (symbol->string x) (symbol->string (car lst))) (cons x lst))
        (else (cons (car lst) (insert-sorted x (cdr lst))))))

(define (my-sort lst)
  (if (null? lst) '()

(import (scheme base))
; Use basic list operations for set union and intersection
(define (set-union A B)
  (define (add-if-missing x lst)
    (if (member x lst) lst (cons x lst)))
  (let loop ((rest A) (acc B))
    (if (null? rest)
        acc
        (loop (cdr rest) (add-if-missing (car rest) acc)))))

(define (set-intersect A B)
  (filter (lambda (x) (member x B)) A))

(define (set-union . sets) (fold lset-union '() sets))
(define (set-intersect s1 s2) (lset-intersection equal? s1 s2))

; Use string comparison for symbol ordering
(define (sym<? a b) (string<? (symbol->string a) (symbol->string b)))

(define (set-union a b)
  (cond ((null? a) b)
        ((null? b) a)
        ((eq? (car a) (car b)) (cons (car a) (set-union (cdr a) (cdr b))))
        ((sym<? (car a) (car b)) (cons (car a) (set-union (cdr a) b)))
        (else (cons (car b) (set-union a (cdr b))))))

(define (set-intersect a b)
  (cond ((null? a) '())
        ((null? b) '())
        ((eq? (car a) (car b)) (cons (car a) (set-intersect (cdr a) (cdr b))))
        ((sym<? (car a) (car b)) (set-intersect (cdr a) b))
        (else (set-intersect a (cdr b)))))

; Manual sort
(define (insert-sorted x lst)
  (cond ((null? lst) (list x))
        ((sym<? x (car lst)) (cons x lst))
        (else (cons (car lst) (insert-sorted x (cdr lst))))))

(define (make-set elems)
  (if (null? elems) '()
      (insert-sorted (car elems) (make-set (cdr elems)))))

; Define all sets
(define A (make-set '(b d f g i l p)))
(define B (make-set '(a c d e f h i o)))
(define C (make-set '(e h j k l o p)))

(define I (make-set '(g h i j k p)))

(define L (make-set '(d)))

(define Q (make-set '(b h j m p)))
(define R (make-set '(a c e h i j k m n o p)))

(display "A=") (display A) (newline)
(display "B=") (display B) (newline)

; Let's work with sets as sorted lists and implement union/intersection directly
(define (my-union s1 s2)
  (cond ((null? s1) s2)
        ((null? s2) s1)
        ((string<? (symbol->string (car s1)) (symbol->string (car s2)))
         (cons (car s1) (my-union (cdr s1) s2)))
        ((string=? (symbol->string (car s1)) (symbol->string (car s2)))
         (cons (car s1) (my-union (cdr s1) (cdr s2))))
        (else
         (cons (car s2) (my-union s1 (cdr s2))))))

(define (my-inter s1 s2)
  (cond ((null? s1) '())
        ((null? s2) '())
        ((string<? (symbol->string (car s1)) (symbol->string (car s2)))
         (my-inter (cdr s1) s2))
        ((string=? (symbol->string (car s1)) (symbol->string (car s2)))
         (cons (car s1) (my-inter (cdr s1) (cdr s2))))
        (else

; Try to find a sort function
(define (my-sort lst less?)
  (if (or (null? lst) (null? (cdr lst)))
      lst
      (let* ((pivot (car lst))
             (rest (cdr lst))
             (smaller (let loop ((l rest) (acc '()))
                        (if (null? l) acc
                            (loop (cdr l) (if (less? (car l) pivot) (cons (car l) acc) acc)))))
             (bigger (let loop ((l rest) (acc '()))
                       (if (null? l) acc
                           (loop (cdr l) (if (less? (car l) pivot) acc (cons (car l) acc)))))))
        (append (my-sort smaller less?) (list pivot) (my-sort bigger less?)))))

;; Build set operations from scratch using basic list ops
(define (my-filter pred lst)
  (cond ((null? lst) '())
        ((pred (car lst)) (cons (car lst) (my-filter pred (cdr lst))))
        (else (my-filter pred (cdr lst)))))

(define (set-union a b)
  (define (add-if-new x lst)
    (if (member x lst) lst (append lst (list x))))
  (define (add-all items result)
    (if (null? items) result
        (add-all (cdr items) (add-if-new (car items) result))))
  (add-all b (add-all a '())))

(define (set-intersect a b)
  (my-filter (lambda (x) (if (member x b) #t #f)) a))

(define (sorted-set lst)
  (define (insert x sorted)
    (cond ((null? sorted) (list x))
          ((string<? x (car sorted)) (cons x sorted))
          (else (cons (car sorted) (insert x (cdr sorted))))))
  (define (fold-ins items acc)
    (if (null? items) acc
        (fold-ins (cdr items) (insert (car items) acc))))
  (fold-ins lst '()))

;; Now compute the right side of the big outer intersection:
;; (((S11 ∪ S12) ∪ S13) ∩ S14) ∪ (S15 ∪ S16)

;; S11 ∪ S12
(define stepA (set-union S11 S12))
(display "stepA S11∪S12: ") (display (sorted-set stepA)) (newline)

;; stepA ∪ S13
(define stepB (set-union stepA S13))
(display "stepB ∪S13: ") (display (sorted-set stepB)) (newline)

;; stepB ∩ S14
(define stepC (set-intersect stepB S14))
(display "stepC ∩S14: ") (display (sorted-set stepC)) (newline)

;; S15 ∪ S16
(define stepD (set-union S15 S16))
(display "stepD S15∪S16: ") (display (sorted-set stepD)) (newline)

;; stepC ∪ stepD
(define stepE (set-union stepC stepD))
(display "stepE (right side of big ∩): ") (display (sorted-set stepE)) (newline)

;; Now: step7 ∩ stepE
(define step8 (set-intersect step7 stepE))
(display "step8 step7∩stepE: ") (display (sorted-set step8)) (newline)

;; S17 ∪ S18
(define step9 (set-union S17 S18))
(display "step9 S17∪S18: ") (display (sorted-set step9)) (newline)

;; Final: step8 ∪ step9
(define final (set-union step8 step9))
(display "FINAL: ") (display (sorted-set final)) (newline)
